summary_of_changes: Initial public release accompanying the MigraFISH data paper. Includes harmonised species-level migration classifications, migration-distance categories, confidence scores, conservation information, provenance fields, and basin-level spatial distributions for 2,536 fish species.
recommended_citation: Cite the Zenodo version DOI for MigraFISH v2026.1 and, when available, the accompanying Scientific Data paper.
